languages.text: "Он безупречно нес свою вахту до конца. Праведность — это отдать жизнь ради служения Золотому Трону".

traits.locale_text: "Он безупречно нес свою вахту до конца. Праведность — это отдать жизнь ради служения Золотому Трону".

languages.text: "He stood watch impeccably to the end. Righteousness is giving one's life in the service of the Golden Throne."
languages.original_text: "Он безупречно нес свою вахту до конца. Праведность — это отдать жизнь ради служения Золотому Трону".

traits.locale_text: "He stood watch impeccably to the end. Righteousness is giving one's life in the service of the Golden Throne."
"He stood watch impeccably to the end. Righteousness is giving one's life in the service of the Golden Throne."
"He stood watch impeccably to the end. Righteousness is giving one's life in the service of the Golden Throne."

languages.text: 「彼は最後まで完璧に任務を遂行した。義理は黄金の座のために命を捧げることである」
languages.original_text: "He stood watch impeccably to the end. Righteousness is giving one's life in the service of the Golden Throne."

traits.locale_text: 「彼は最後まで完璧に任務を遂行した。義理は黄金の座のために命を捧げることである。」

languages.text: “他无可挑剔地服役至最后一刻。正义，就是侍奉黄金王座，直至生命的终结。”
languages.original_text: "He stood watch impeccably to the end. Righteousness is giving one's life in the service of the Golden Throne."

traits.locale_text: “他无可挑剔地服役至最后一刻。正义，就是侍奉黄金王座，直至生命的终结。”

languages.text: «Mantuvo una guardia impecable hasta el final. La virtud es entregar la vida al servicio del Trono Dorado».
languages.original_text: "He stood watch impeccably to the end. Righteousness is giving one's life in the service of the Golden Throne."

traits.locale_text: «Mantuvo una guardia impecable hasta el final. La virtud es entregar la vida al servicio del Trono Dorado».

languages.text: "Er hat bis zuletzt untadelig Wache gehalten. Rechtschaffenheit heißt, sein Leben in den Dienst des Goldenen Throns zu stellen."
languages.original_text: "He stood watch impeccably to the end. Righteousness is giving one's life in the service of the Golden Throne."

traits.locale_text: "Er hat bis zuletzt untadelig Wache gehalten. Rechtschaffenheit heißt, sein Leben in den Dienst des Goldenen Throns zu stellen."

languages.text: « Il a monté la garde avec un zèle irréprochable jusqu'à la fin. Donner sa vie au service du Trône d'Or est une preuve de vertu. »
languages.original_text: "He stood watch impeccably to the end. Righteousness is giving one's life in the service of the Golden Throne."

traits.locale_text: « Il a monté la garde avec un zèle irréprochable jusqu'à la fin. Donner sa vie au service du Trône d'Or est une preuve de vertu. »

languages.text: "Son anına kadar kusursuz bir şekilde nöbet tumuş. Doğruluk, hayatını Altın Taht'ın hizmetine adamaktır."
languages.original_text: "He stood watch impeccably to the end. Righteousness is giving one's life in the service of the Golden Throne."

traits.locale_text: "Son anına kadar kusursuz bir şekilde nöbet tumuş. Doğruluk, hayatını Altın Taht'ın hizmetine adamaktır."
